text.title: Compute and Database Rightsizing Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for the finops-devops-cost-rightsizing methodology.

example.context: Acme prod cluster shows 23% CPU and 38% memory utilisation over the last 14 days while On-Demand spend grew 18% month-over-month.
example.inputs: Prometheus P95 metrics for 21 deployments; kubecost export; FinOps dashboard.

findings.finding: api-prod requests 4 vCPU, P95 = 0.9 vCPU — 4.4× headroom
Batch namespace runs 24/7 but workloads only fire 02:00-04:00 UTC

recommendations.recommendation: Lower CPU request to 1.2 vCPU and switch instance family to c7g (Graviton)
Move batch namespace to Spot pool with min=0 / max=20

example.output-summary: Estimated $4.8k/month saving with no SLO change; HPA min replicas raised from 2 to 3 to absorb the smaller pod size.
